description: Protein-focused diet ideal for muscle building, recovery, and maintaining lean body mass

hp_egg_white_veggie_scramble.name: Egg White Veggie Scramble
hp_egg_white_veggie_scramble.description: Fluffy egg whites loaded with spinach, bell peppers, and mushrooms, served with whole wheat toast
instructions: Heat olive oil in a non-stick skillet over medium heat.
Saute bell pepper and mushrooms for 3 minutes until softened.
Add spinach and cook until wilted, about 1 minute.
Pour in egg whites and gently scramble until set, about 3-4 minutes.
Season with salt and pepper. Serve with toasted whole wheat bread.

hp_greek_yogurt_protein_bowl.name: Greek Yogurt Protein Power Bowl
hp_greek_yogurt_protein_bowl.description: Thick Greek yogurt topped with berries, granola, chia seeds, and a drizzle of honey
instructions: Add Greek yogurt to a bowl and mix in the whey protein powder until smooth.
Top with mixed berries and granola.
Sprinkle chia seeds over the top.
Drizzle with honey and serve immediately.

hp_turkey_sausage_egg_muffins.name: Turkey Sausage Egg Muffins
hp_turkey_sausage_egg_muffins.description: Portable baked egg muffins packed with turkey sausage, cheddar, and chives
instructions: Preheat oven to 375°F. Spray a 6-cup muffin tin with cooking spray.
Brown the turkey sausage in a skillet over medium heat, breaking into crumbles, about 5 minutes.
Whisk eggs in a bowl and stir in cooked sausage, cheese, chives, onion, salt, and pepper.
Divide mixture evenly among muffin cups.
Bake for 18-20 minutes until set and lightly golden.
Let cool 2 minutes before removing. Serves 2 (3 muffins each).

hp_protein_oatmeal.name: Protein-Packed Oatmeal
hp_protein_oatmeal.description: Creamy oats blended with whey protein, topped with banana slices and almond butter
instructions: Combine oats and water in a saucepan. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer for 5 minutes.
Remove from heat and let cool for 1 minute.
Stir in whey protein powder until fully combined.
Top with banana slices, almond butter, and a pinch of cinnamon.

hp_cottage_cheese_pancakes.name: Cottage Cheese Protein Pancakes
hp_cottage_cheese_pancakes.description: Light and fluffy pancakes made with cottage cheese and oats for a protein-rich breakfast
instructions: Blend cottage cheese, oats, eggs, vanilla, and baking powder in a blender until smooth.
Heat a non-stick skillet over medium heat and spray with cooking spray.
Pour 1/4 cup batter per pancake. Cook until bubbles form on top, about 2-3 minutes.
Flip and cook another 1-2 minutes until golden brown.
Serve topped with fresh blueberries. Makes about 6 pancakes.

hp_smoked_salmon_toast.name: Smoked Salmon Avocado Toast
hp_smoked_salmon_toast.description: Whole grain toast layered with mashed avocado, smoked salmon, capers, and a poached egg
instructions: Toast the bread until golden and crisp.
Mash avocado with lemon juice and spread evenly on both slices.
Poach the egg in simmering water with a splash of vinegar for 3-4 minutes.
Layer smoked salmon on top of the avocado toast.
Top with the poached egg, capers, fresh dill, and black pepper.

hp_breakfast_burrito.name: High-Protein Breakfast Burrito
hp_breakfast_burrito.description: A hearty whole wheat tortilla stuffed with scrambled eggs, turkey bacon, black beans, and salsa
instructions: Cook turkey bacon in a skillet until crisp. Chop into pieces.
Scramble eggs in olive oil over medium heat until just set.
Warm the tortilla in a dry skillet or microwave for 15 seconds.
Layer eggs, turkey bacon, black beans, cheese, and salsa in the center of the tortilla.
Fold in the sides and roll tightly into a burrito.

hp_overnight_protein_oats.name: Overnight Protein Oats
hp_overnight_protein_oats.description: No-cook oats soaked overnight with protein powder, topped with walnuts and strawberries
instructions: Combine oats, protein powder, almond milk, and Greek yogurt in a jar or container.
Stir well until fully mixed with no clumps.
Cover and refrigerate for at least 6 hours or overnight.
In the morning, top with strawberries, walnuts, and a drizzle of honey.

hp_spinach_feta_egg_wrap.name: Spinach Feta Egg White Wrap
hp_spinach_feta_egg_wrap.description: A light whole wheat wrap filled with seasoned egg whites, spinach, sun-dried tomatoes, and feta
instructions: Heat olive oil in a non-stick skillet over medium heat.
Add spinach and sun-dried tomatoes, cook until spinach is wilted, about 1 minute.
Pour in egg whites seasoned with garlic powder, salt, and pepper.
Scramble gently until egg whites are fully cooked, about 3 minutes.
Warm the wrap in a dry skillet for 30 seconds per side.
Fill wrap with the egg white mixture and top with crumbled feta. Fold and serve.

hp_chocolate_banana_smoothie.name: Chocolate Banana Protein Smoothie
hp_chocolate_banana_smoothie.description: A thick creamy smoothie blending whey protein, banana, peanut butter, and cocoa for a satisfying start
instructions: Add almond milk, frozen banana, and peanut butter to a blender.
Add protein powder, cocoa powder, and ice.
Blend on high for 45-60 seconds until smooth and creamy.
Pour into a glass and serve immediately.

hp_steak_and_eggs.name: Steak and Eggs
hp_steak_and_eggs.description: Classic bodybuilding breakfast with seared sirloin steak, sunny-side-up eggs, and sauteed asparagus
instructions: Season steak with salt, pepper, and garlic powder on both sides.
Heat olive oil in a cast iron skillet over high heat. Sear steak 3-4 minutes per side for medium.
Remove steak and let rest for 3 minutes.
In the same skillet, reduce heat to medium and melt butter. Fry eggs sunny-side-up for 3 minutes.
Meanwhile, sauté asparagus in a separate pan with a drizzle of oil for 3 minutes.
Slice steak and serve with eggs and asparagus.

hp_ham_cheese_omelette.name: Ham and Cheese Omelette
hp_ham_cheese_omelette.description: A golden omelette filled with lean ham, Swiss cheese, and diced tomatoes
instructions: Whisk eggs with salt and pepper in a bowl.
Melt butter in a non-stick skillet over medium heat.
Pour in eggs and let set for 1 minute without stirring.
Add ham, Swiss cheese, and tomatoes to one half of the omelette.
Fold the other half over the fillings and cook 2-3 more minutes until cheese melts.
Slide onto a plate and garnish with chives.

hp_grilled_chicken_rice.name: Grilled Chicken and Brown Rice
hp_grilled_chicken_rice.description: Classic meal-prep staple with seasoned grilled chicken breast, brown rice, and steamed broccoli
instructions: Season chicken breast with garlic powder, paprika, salt, and pepper.
Heat olive oil in a grill pan or skillet over medium-high heat.
Grill chicken for 6-7 minutes per side until internal temperature reaches 165°F.
Steam broccoli florets for 4-5 minutes until tender-crisp.
Let chicken rest for 3 minutes, then slice. Serve over brown rice with broccoli.

hp_turkey_quinoa_bowl.name: Ground Turkey Quinoa Bowl
hp_turkey_quinoa_bowl.description: Seasoned lean ground turkey over fluffy quinoa with black beans, corn, and avocado
instructions: Heat olive oil in a skillet over medium-high heat.
Add ground turkey, cumin, and chili powder. Cook, breaking apart, for 6-7 minutes until browned.
In a separate pot, cook quinoa according to package directions (or use pre-cooked).
Warm black beans and corn in the microwave for 1 minute.
Assemble bowl with quinoa, turkey, black beans, corn, avocado slices, and salsa.

hp_tuna_salad_wrap.name: Tuna Salad Lettuce Wraps
hp_tuna_salad_wrap.description: Light and fresh tuna salad made with Greek yogurt, wrapped in crisp butter lettuce leaves
ingredients: 2 cans (5 oz each) albacore tuna in water, drained
instructions: Drain tuna thoroughly and flake into a mixing bowl.
Add Greek yogurt, Dijon mustard, and lemon juice. Mix well.
Fold in diced celery and red onion. Season with salt and pepper.
Wash and pat dry the lettuce leaves.
Divide tuna salad evenly among the lettuce leaves and serve.

hp_chicken_caesar_salad.name: Grilled Chicken Caesar Salad
hp_chicken_caesar_salad.description: Crisp romaine lettuce with grilled chicken, parmesan, croutons, and light Caesar dressing
instructions: Season chicken with garlic powder, salt, and pepper.
Heat olive oil in a grill pan over medium-high heat and cook chicken 6-7 minutes per side.
Let chicken rest 3 minutes, then slice into strips.
Toss romaine lettuce with Caesar dressing in a large bowl.
Top with sliced chicken, Parmesan cheese, and croutons.

hp_salmon_sweet_potato.name: Baked Salmon with Sweet Potato
hp_salmon_sweet_potato.description: Herb-crusted baked salmon fillet served with roasted sweet potato and green beans
instructions: Preheat oven to 400°F. Line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
Toss sweet potato cubes with half the olive oil, salt, and pepper. Spread on baking sheet.
Roast sweet potatoes for 10 minutes.
Season salmon with dill, garlic powder, salt, pepper, and remaining olive oil. Place on the baking sheet with sweet potatoes.
Add green beans to the sheet. Bake everything for 12-15 minutes until salmon flakes easily.
Squeeze lemon over salmon before serving.

hp_lean_beef_stir_fry.name: Lean Beef and Vegetable Stir-Fry
hp_lean_beef_stir_fry.description: Tender strips of lean sirloin stir-fried with colorful vegetables in a savory soy ginger sauce
ingredients: 6 oz top sirloin steak, sliced thin
instructions: Toss sliced beef with cornstarch, half the soy sauce, and a pinch of pepper.
Heat sesame oil in a wok or large skillet over high heat.
Stir-fry beef for 2-3 minutes until browned. Remove and set aside.
Add broccoli, bell pepper, and snap peas to the wok. Stir-fry for 3-4 minutes.
Return beef to the wok. Add garlic, ginger, and remaining soy sauce. Toss to combine.
Serve immediately over jasmine rice.

hp_chicken_avocado_wrap.name: Chicken Avocado Spinach Wrap
hp_chicken_avocado_wrap.description: A satisfying whole wheat wrap filled with sliced grilled chicken, avocado, spinach, and hummus
instructions: Spread hummus evenly across the center of the tortilla.
Layer spinach leaves, sliced chicken, avocado, tomato, and red onion.
Fold in the sides of the tortilla.
Roll tightly from the bottom up into a wrap.
Cut in half diagonally and serve.

hp_shrimp_cauliflower_rice.name: Garlic Shrimp with Cauliflower Rice
hp_shrimp_cauliflower_rice.description: Juicy garlic-butter shrimp served over seasoned cauliflower rice with a squeeze of lemon
ingredients: 8 oz large shrimp, peeled and deveined
instructions: Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat. Add cauliflower rice and cook 4-5 minutes until tender.
Season cauliflower rice with salt and pepper. Transfer to a plate.
In the same skillet, melt butter over medium-high heat.
Add shrimp and garlic. Cook 2-3 minutes per side until shrimp are pink and opaque.
Sprinkle with red pepper flakes and parsley. Squeeze lemon over top.
Serve shrimp over the cauliflower rice.

hp_lentil_turkey_soup.name: Turkey and Lentil Soup
hp_lentil_turkey_soup.description: A hearty soup loaded with ground turkey, green lentils, carrots, and warming spices
instructions: Heat olive oil in a large pot over medium heat. Brown the ground turkey for 5 minutes, breaking apart.
Add onion, carrot, and celery. Sauté 3-4 minutes until softened.
Stir in cumin, turmeric, salt, and pepper.
Add lentils, chicken broth, and water. Bring to a boil.
Reduce heat, cover, and simmer for 25-30 minutes until lentils are tender.
Adjust seasoning and serve hot.

hp_chicken_pesto_pasta.name: Chicken Pesto Pasta
hp_chicken_pesto_pasta.description: Whole wheat penne tossed with basil pesto, grilled chicken, cherry tomatoes, and Parmesan
instructions: Cook penne in salted boiling water according to package directions. Drain, reserving 2 tbsp pasta water.
Season chicken with salt and pepper. Grill or pan-sear in olive oil for 6-7 minutes per side. Slice.
In the pasta pot, combine cooked penne, pesto, reserved pasta water, and spinach. Toss until spinach wilts.
Add cherry tomatoes and sliced chicken. Toss gently.
Plate and top with shredded Parmesan.

hp_teriyaki_chicken_bowl.name: Teriyaki Chicken Rice Bowl
hp_teriyaki_chicken_bowl.description: Glazed teriyaki chicken thighs over steamed rice with edamame and pickled cucumber
instructions: Marinate chicken thighs in 1 tbsp teriyaki sauce for 5 minutes.
Heat olive oil in a skillet over medium-high heat. Cook chicken 5-6 minutes per side until cooked through.
Brush remaining teriyaki sauce on chicken during the last minute. Slice into strips.
Toss cucumber slices with rice vinegar for a quick pickle.
Assemble bowl with rice, chicken strips, edamame, and pickled cucumber. Sprinkle with sesame seeds.

hp_egg_salad_sandwich.name: High-Protein Egg Salad Sandwich
hp_egg_salad_sandwich.description: Egg salad made with extra egg whites and Greek yogurt on toasted whole grain bread
instructions: Place eggs and extra egg whites in a pot, cover with water, and bring to a boil. Cover, remove from heat, and let sit 10-12 minutes.
Transfer to an ice bath to cool. Peel and roughly chop.
Mix chopped eggs with Greek yogurt, Dijon mustard, celery, and chives.
Season with salt and pepper.
Toast bread and layer lettuce, then egg salad between the slices.

hp_grilled_chicken_sweet_potato.name: Grilled Chicken with Roasted Sweet Potato
hp_grilled_chicken_sweet_potato.description: Herb-marinated grilled chicken breast with roasted sweet potato wedges and a side salad
ingredients: 1 medium sweet potato, cut into wedges
instructions: Preheat oven to 425°F. Toss sweet potato wedges with half the olive oil, salt, and pepper.
Spread on a baking sheet and roast for 25-30 minutes, flipping halfway.
Marinate chicken with remaining olive oil, rosemary, thyme, garlic powder, salt, and pepper.
Grill or pan-sear chicken over medium-high heat for 6-7 minutes per side.
Let chicken rest 3 minutes before slicing.
Serve sliced chicken with sweet potato wedges and mixed greens tossed in balsamic vinaigrette.

hp_baked_cod_asparagus.name: Baked Cod with Asparagus
hp_baked_cod_asparagus.description: Flaky cod fillets baked with lemon, garlic, and served alongside roasted asparagus and wild rice
instructions: Preheat oven to 400°F. Line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
Place cod fillet on the sheet. Drizzle with half the olive oil, lemon juice, garlic, and oregano.
Arrange asparagus around the cod. Drizzle with remaining olive oil, salt, and pepper.
Bake for 15-18 minutes until cod flakes easily with a fork.
Serve with wild rice and a sprinkle of lemon zest.

hp_turkey_meatballs_marinara.name: Turkey Meatballs with Marinara
hp_turkey_meatballs_marinara.description: Baked lean turkey meatballs simmered in a robust marinara sauce over whole wheat spaghetti
instructions: Preheat oven to 400°F. Line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
Mix ground turkey, egg white, breadcrumbs, garlic, Italian seasoning, parsley, salt, and pepper. Form into 8 meatballs.
Place meatballs on the baking sheet and bake for 18-20 minutes until cooked through.
Meanwhile, cook spaghetti according to package directions.
Heat marinara sauce in a saucepan. Add baked meatballs and simmer 3-5 minutes.
Serve meatballs and sauce over spaghetti, topped with Parmesan.

hp_grilled_salmon_quinoa.name: Grilled Salmon with Lemon Quinoa
hp_grilled_salmon_quinoa.description: Grilled salmon fillet served on a bed of lemon-herb quinoa with roasted zucchini
instructions: Preheat grill or grill pan to medium-high heat.
Brush salmon with half the olive oil, season with salt, pepper, and garlic.
Grill salmon skin-side down for 5-6 minutes, flip and cook 3-4 minutes more.
Toss zucchini with remaining olive oil, salt, and pepper. Grill or roast at 425°F for 8-10 minutes.
Toss cooked quinoa with lemon juice and fresh dill.
Plate quinoa, top with salmon fillet, and serve zucchini alongside.

hp_lean_beef_tacos.name: Lean Beef Tacos
hp_lean_beef_tacos.description: Seasoned lean ground beef in corn tortillas with fresh pico de gallo, lettuce, and Greek yogurt crema
instructions: Brown the ground beef in a skillet over medium-high heat, breaking apart, for 5-6 minutes.
Season with chili powder, cumin, and garlic powder. Cook 1-2 more minutes.
Make pico de gallo by combining diced tomatoes, red onion, cilantro, and lime juice.
Warm corn tortillas in a dry skillet for 30 seconds per side.
Fill tortillas with seasoned beef, lettuce, pico de gallo, and a dollop of Greek yogurt.

hp_chicken_stir_fry_noodles.name: Chicken Stir-Fry with Rice Noodles
hp_chicken_stir_fry_noodles.description: Sliced chicken breast stir-fried with vegetables and thin rice noodles in a light soy-sesame sauce
ingredients: 7 oz boneless skinless chicken breast, sliced
1 cup mixed stir-fry vegetables (bell pepper, snap peas, carrots)
instructions: Soak rice noodles in boiling water for 5-7 minutes until tender. Drain and set aside.
Toss chicken slices with cornstarch and half the soy sauce.
Heat sesame oil in a wok over high heat. Stir-fry chicken for 4-5 minutes until golden. Remove.
Add vegetables, garlic, and ginger to the wok. Stir-fry 3-4 minutes.
Return chicken to wok, add noodles, remaining soy sauce, and rice vinegar. Toss to combine.
Garnish with sliced green onion and serve immediately.

hp_stuffed_bell_peppers.name: Turkey-Stuffed Bell Peppers
hp_stuffed_bell_peppers.description: Colorful bell peppers stuffed with seasoned ground turkey, rice, tomato sauce, and melted cheese
ingredients: 2 large bell peppers, halved and seeded
instructions: Preheat oven to 375°F. Place pepper halves cut-side up in a baking dish.
Brown ground turkey with onion and garlic in a skillet for 5-6 minutes.
Stir in cooked rice, tomato sauce, Italian seasoning, salt, and pepper.
Spoon the turkey-rice mixture into each pepper half.
Cover with foil and bake for 25 minutes. Remove foil, top with mozzarella, and bake 5 more minutes until cheese melts.

hp_herb_crusted_chicken_thigh.name: Herb-Crusted Chicken Thighs
hp_herb_crusted_chicken_thigh.description: Juicy bone-in chicken thighs with a crispy herb crust, served with roasted Brussels sprouts
ingredients: 2 bone-in, skin-on chicken thighs (about 8 oz total meat)
instructions: Preheat oven to 425°F.
Pat chicken thighs dry. Mix rosemary, thyme, garlic powder, onion powder, salt, and pepper. Rub over chicken.
Heat olive oil in an oven-safe skillet over medium-high heat. Sear chicken skin-side down for 4 minutes until crispy.
Flip chicken. Add Brussels sprouts around the chicken in the skillet.
Transfer skillet to oven and roast for 25-30 minutes until chicken reaches 175°F internal temp.
Let rest 5 minutes before serving.

hp_pork_tenderloin_vegetables.name: Roasted Pork Tenderloin with Vegetables
hp_pork_tenderloin_vegetables.description: Lean pork tenderloin roasted with root vegetables, garlic, and a Dijon glaze
instructions: Preheat oven to 400°F.
Rub pork tenderloin with Dijon mustard, garlic, sage, salt, and pepper.
Toss butternut squash, carrots, and red onion with olive oil, salt, and pepper.
Spread vegetables on a baking sheet. Place pork tenderloin on top.
Roast for 25-30 minutes until pork internal temperature reaches 145°F.
Let pork rest 5 minutes, then slice into medallions. Serve over roasted vegetables.

hp_blackened_tilapia.name: Blackened Tilapia with Cilantro Lime Rice
hp_blackened_tilapia.description: Spicy blackened tilapia fillets served over fragrant cilantro lime rice with a mango salsa
instructions: Mix paprika, cayenne, garlic powder, onion powder, salt, and pepper for the blackening spice.
Coat tilapia fillets evenly with the spice mix.
Heat olive oil in a skillet over high heat. Cook tilapia 3-4 minutes per side until blackened and flaky.
Toss cooked rice with cilantro and lime juice.
Make quick mango salsa by combining mango, red onion, a squeeze of lime, and cilantro.
Plate the cilantro lime rice, top with tilapia, and spoon mango salsa alongside.

hp_chicken_fajita_bowl.name: Chicken Fajita Bowl
hp_chicken_fajita_bowl.description: Colorful fajita-style chicken with sauteed peppers and onions over cilantro lime rice with beans
ingredients: 7 oz boneless skinless chicken breast, sliced
instructions: Season chicken slices with chili powder, cumin, smoked paprika, salt, and pepper.
Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat. Cook chicken for 5-6 minutes until done. Remove.
In the same skillet, sauté peppers and onion for 4-5 minutes until slightly charred.
Toss brown rice with lime juice and cilantro.
Assemble bowl with rice, black beans, fajita chicken, and sautéed peppers and onions.

hp_bison_burger.name: Bison Burger with Sweet Potato Fries
hp_bison_burger.description: A lean bison patty on a whole wheat bun with lettuce, tomato, and baked sweet potato fries
ingredients: 1 medium sweet potato, cut into fries
instructions: Preheat oven to 425°F. Toss sweet potato fries with olive oil, smoked paprika, and salt.
Spread on a baking sheet and bake 20-25 minutes, flipping halfway.
Form bison into a patty, season with garlic powder, salt, and pepper.
Grill or pan-sear the patty over medium-high heat, 4 minutes per side for medium.
Toast the bun lightly. Assemble burger with lettuce, tomato, and red onion.
Serve with sweet potato fries on the side.

hp_chicken_tikka_masala.name: Chicken Tikka Masala (Lighter Version)
hp_chicken_tikka_masala.description: Tender chicken in a creamy, spiced tomato-yogurt sauce served over basmati rice
ingredients: 7 oz boneless skinless chicken breast, cubed
instructions: Marinate chicken cubes in 1 tbsp Greek yogurt, half the garam masala, and turmeric for at least 10 minutes.
Heat olive oil in a skillet over medium-high heat. Cook chicken cubes for 5-6 minutes until golden. Remove.
In the same pan, sauté garlic and ginger for 1 minute. Add crushed tomatoes, remaining garam masala, cumin, and paprika.
Simmer sauce for 8-10 minutes until thickened. Stir in remaining Greek yogurt.
Return chicken to the sauce and cook 3-4 minutes. Adjust seasoning.
Serve over basmati rice, garnished with fresh cilantro.

hp_protein_trail_mix.name: High-Protein Trail Mix
hp_protein_trail_mix.description: A crunchy mix of roasted almonds, pumpkin seeds, dried edamame, and dark chocolate chips
instructions: Measure out all ingredients.
Combine in a small container or bag.
Mix well and enjoy. Store in an airtight container for up to 2 weeks.

hp_cottage_cheese_berries.name: Cottage Cheese with Berries and Honey
hp_cottage_cheese_berries.description: Creamy low-fat cottage cheese topped with fresh mixed berries and a light drizzle of honey
instructions: Scoop cottage cheese into a bowl.
Top with mixed berries and sliced almonds.
Drizzle honey over the top and serve.

hp_turkey_roll_ups.name: Turkey and Cheese Roll-Ups
hp_turkey_roll_ups.description: Sliced lean turkey breast rolled around cheese sticks with mustard, served with baby carrots
ingredients: 4 oz sliced lean deli turkey breast
instructions: Lay out turkey slices flat. Spread a thin layer of Dijon mustard on each.
Cut the cheese stick in half lengthwise.
Place cheese at the end of each turkey slice and roll up tightly.
Serve with baby carrots on the side.

hp_protein_energy_bites.name: Peanut Butter Protein Energy Bites
hp_protein_energy_bites.description: No-bake bites made with oats, peanut butter, whey protein, honey, and mini chocolate chips
instructions: Combine oats, protein powder, and flaxseed in a bowl.
Add peanut butter and honey. Mix until a sticky dough forms.
Fold in chocolate chips.
Roll into 6 small balls. Refrigerate for at least 30 minutes before eating.
Store in the fridge for up to 1 week. Makes 2 servings (3 bites each).

hp_hard_boiled_eggs_hummus.name: Hard-Boiled Eggs with Hummus and Veggies
hp_hard_boiled_eggs_hummus.description: Two hard-boiled eggs paired with creamy hummus and crispy sliced cucumber and bell pepper
instructions: Place eggs in a pot, cover with cold water, and bring to a boil.
Once boiling, cover and remove from heat. Let sit 10-12 minutes.
Transfer eggs to an ice bath. Peel and halve.
Arrange eggs on a plate with hummus, cucumber slices, and bell pepper slices.
Sprinkle paprika over the eggs and serve.

hp_greek_yogurt_parfait.name: Greek Yogurt Parfait
hp_greek_yogurt_parfait.description: Layered nonfat Greek yogurt with crunchy granola and a medley of fresh fruit
instructions: Spoon half the Greek yogurt into a glass or bowl.
Add a layer of granola and half the berries.
Add the remaining yogurt on top.
Top with remaining berries and drizzle with honey.

hp_edamame_sea_salt.name: Steamed Edamame with Sea Salt
hp_edamame_sea_salt.description: Warm steamed edamame pods sprinkled with flaky sea salt and a touch of garlic
instructions: Bring a pot of water to a boil. Add frozen edamame and cook 4-5 minutes.
Drain well and transfer to a bowl.
Sprinkle with sea salt and garlic powder. Toss to coat.
Serve warm. Squeeze pods to pop out the beans.

hp_protein_shake_post_workout.name: Post-Workout Protein Shake
hp_protein_shake_post_workout.description: A quick-absorbing protein shake with whey, banana, and almond milk to fuel recovery
instructions: Add almond milk and banana to a blender.
Add protein powder, ice, and honey.
Blend on high for 30-45 seconds until smooth.
Pour and drink immediately after your workout.

hp_tuna_cucumber_bites.name: Tuna Cucumber Bites
hp_tuna_cucumber_bites.description: Thick cucumber rounds topped with seasoned tuna salad, a caper, and a sprinkle of everything seasoning
ingredients: 1 can (5 oz) albacore tuna in water, drained
instructions: Drain tuna and mix in a bowl with Greek yogurt, Dijon mustard, and lemon juice.
Season with salt and pepper.
Slice cucumber into 1/2-inch thick rounds (about 12 rounds).
Top each cucumber round with a spoonful of tuna mixture.
Sprinkle everything bagel seasoning over the top and serve.

hp_chicken_black_bean_bowl.name: Chicken and Black Bean Power Bowl
hp_chicken_black_bean_bowl.description: Shredded chicken breast with seasoned black beans, brown rice, roasted corn, and lime crema
instructions: Season chicken with cumin, chili powder, salt, and pepper.
Heat olive oil in a skillet over medium-high heat. Cook chicken 6-7 minutes per side. Let rest 3 minutes, then shred with two forks.
Warm black beans and corn in the microwave or a small saucepan.
Mix Greek yogurt with lime juice for the crema.
Assemble bowl with brown rice, shredded chicken, black beans, and corn.
Drizzle with lime crema and garnish with cilantro.

hp_mediterranean_chicken_plate.name: Mediterranean Chicken Plate
hp_mediterranean_chicken_plate.description: Grilled chicken served with tabbouleh, hummus, cucumber, and warm whole wheat pita
instructions: Season chicken with za'atar, salt, pepper, and a drizzle of olive oil.
Grill or pan-sear chicken over medium-high heat for 6-7 minutes per side until cooked through.
Let chicken rest 3 minutes, then slice.
Warm the pita in a dry skillet or toaster for 30 seconds.
Arrange sliced chicken, tabbouleh, hummus, and cucumber slices on a plate. Squeeze lemon juice over the top.

hp_honey_garlic_chicken.name: Honey Garlic Chicken with Jasmine Rice
hp_honey_garlic_chicken.description: Tender chicken breast glazed in a sticky honey garlic sauce, served with steamed jasmine rice and bok choy
ingredients: 1 tsp cornstarch mixed with 1 tbsp water
instructions: Season chicken breast with salt and pepper. Heat olive oil in a skillet over medium-high heat.
Cook chicken 6-7 minutes per side until golden and cooked through. Remove and let rest.
In the same skillet, sauté garlic for 30 seconds. Add honey, soy sauce, and rice vinegar.
Stir in cornstarch slurry and simmer until sauce thickens, about 1-2 minutes.
Steam bok choy in a covered pot with 1 inch of water for 3-4 minutes until tender.
Slice chicken, drizzle with honey garlic sauce, sprinkle sesame seeds, and serve with rice and bok choy.

hp_beef_jerky_cheese_apple.name: Beef Jerky with Cheese and Apple
hp_beef_jerky_cheese_apple.description: A satisfying portable snack pairing lean beef jerky with string cheese and crisp apple slices
instructions: Slice the apple into wedges.
Portion out the beef jerky and string cheese.
Arrange on a plate or pack into a container for an on-the-go snack.
